subcodes.first_line: All the world, on this promised Day, is illumined by the lights of the Countenance of the Lord of existence, yet some through their deeds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع عالم در این یوم موعود بانوار وجه مالک وجود منور ولکن بعضی باعمال و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
